stemHtml: Where are the highest concentrations of ice crystals most likely to occur?

options.a: In the spreading cirrus from the top of any warm front.
options.b: At the freezing level surrounding the central uplift core of a convective storm.
options.c: Within downdraughts associated with a large tropical revolving storm.
options.d: In the anvil overhead the core of an oceanic mesoscale convective system.
